sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7116" key="a)/nacis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄναξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n7116.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bringing up, raising up,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0527.tlg035:18:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Psalm.Solom.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
